specific_question: Between April 1 and December 31, 2025, how many cross-departmental workflow planning reviews did Elexion Automotive conduct using its internal collaboration logs?
answer: According to internal collaboration logs, Elexion conducted 18 cross-departmental workflow planning reviews between April 1 and December 31, 2025 using its internal collaboration logs.
